_comment: Per-case expected TRANSITIVE effect set. Each case is a function present in BOTH rust/src/lib.rs and java/Cases.java with equivalent semantics; the runner asserts candor-scan and candor-java each infer exactly this set. Scope is the std-only subset both languages can express without dependencies (see README) — Db/Rand/Log/Clipboard/Ipc need per-language deps or are structurally asymmetric and are covered by each impl's own tests.
